name: Serious B2B landing page
brief: Design a credible B2B operations landing page with a product-specific thesis, real proof, accessible navigation, responsive composition, and a fast primary conversion path.

name: Consumer product landing page
brief: Create a distinctive consumer product launch page with honest content, image art direction, touch-friendly interactions, and restrained motion.

name: Developer-tool website
brief: Build a developer-tool website with precise technical copy, code samples, keyboard-accessible navigation, credible performance, and a distinctive technical visual system.

name: Dense enterprise dashboard
brief: Plan a dense enterprise dashboard with an application shell, data hierarchy, role-aware navigation, robust states, responsive tables, and keyboard operation.

name: Mobile onboarding flow
brief: Design a mobile onboarding flow with progressive disclosure, recovery, virtual-keyboard resilience, accessible forms, and safe persistence.

name: Settings interface
brief: Build an account settings interface with clear grouping, save feedback, destructive confirmations, permission states, and unsaved-change recovery.

name: Searchable data table
brief: Create a searchable and sortable data table with URL state, empty and error states, keyboard access, responsive alternatives, and scalable rendering.

name: Checkout or application form
brief: Implement a high-trust checkout form with autofill, international inputs, inline and summary errors, double-submit prevention, failure recovery, and privacy boundaries.

name: Existing ugly frontend redesign
brief: Redesign an existing frontend after auditing it; preserve working behavior and architecture, target evidence-backed weaknesses, compare before and after, and test regressions.

name: Screenshot reconstruction
brief: Reconstruct a reference screenshot responsively, separating observed facts from inference, matching geometry and assets, preserving semantics, and comparing captured output.

name: Design-system-constrained implementation
brief: Implement a feature within an existing design system, using semantic tokens and component contracts, avoiding uncontrolled variants, and documenting exceptions.

name: Accessibility-sensitive public-service page
brief: Create a public-service eligibility page using plain language, native semantics, robust validation, keyboard operation, zoom reflow, and conservative progressive enhancement.

name: Dark-mode product interface
brief: Add dark mode to a product interface using semantic roles, tested contrast, correct state colors, system preferences, and no runtime flash.

name: RTL-localized interface
brief: Localize a product interface for RTL with bidirectional text safety, mirrored layout where semantic, locale formatting, content expansion, and preserved source order.

name: Small animated component
brief: Refine a small animated popover with purposeful spatial continuity, correct origin, interruption and reversal, repeated-use behavior, reduced motion, and transform performance.

name: Performance remediation task
brief: Remediate a slow media-heavy frontend using measured Core Web Vitals, explicit budgets, image and font delivery, JavaScript reduction, network constraints, and regression checks.
